title: ecbolium retusum
intro: Ecbolium retusum, a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae, is native to tropical Africa and is also known as the hairy ecbolium. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ecbolium retusum include the treatment of fever, digestive issues, and skin infections, as well as its use as an antiseptic and antipyretic. Herbal preparations of Ecbolium retusum typically involve the leaves and stems being dried and then used in teas, infusions, or as a powder for medicinal purposes.
